content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1500: Thing returns to its rightful owner

Translator: Sigma_ Editor: Hitesh_

A massive, black cave was spinning somewhere in the Sea Domain of Nihility where the Devouring Clan gathered.

In the thick darkness, an imposing, majestic Power Upanishad Symbol Tower hovered. The Absolute Beginning symbols on the tower were sparkling with many colors. Wisps of pure Dark Energy crawled on the tower to clear the Soul Seal Hui had left there.

Devour had released its evil, cold Soul Consciousness to refine and erase the Seal Hui had left.

All of a sudden, a sincere call came from a place far away. As the enormous tower had just got rid of Hui’s Soul Seal, it was attracted by the call. Without waiting for Devour to react, it accelerated instantly and flew away. In the blink of an eye, it had moved billions of miles.

Tearing layers of space, Devour had escaped from Desolate Territory. He had to consume a lot of energy, and erasing Hui’s Soul Seal on the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower took a big part of his energy too. Devour had just ceased to breathe when the tower had already flown away.

At this moment, Devour’s power hadn’t recovered yet, and he didn’t have the power to hold it back. He could only see the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower pierce through layers of space and disappear.

Devour, the giant black octopus, howled to call his clansmen of the Devouring Clan.

Shortly, the two Territory Ancestors, Edgar and Labitte arrived. Edgar hovered by the Dark Abyss, asking respectfully, “Ancestor, why are you enraged?”

“The Power Upanishad Symbol Tower escaped my control, flying to Desolate Territory!” Devour’s voice arose in the Dark Abyss. “If it’s not Hui, it’s the new master of the tower. He had contacted the tower, but Hui’s Soul Seal had stopped him. As soon as I erased Hui’s seal, I don’t know why it’s so coincidental that the kid called it! Damn it!”

“Where’s he?” asked Edgar.

“The void outside Desolate Territory.”

“Let me figure out the way to go there.”

“Get that kid before Hui. Otherwise, you won’t get the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower. The Power Upanishad Symbol Tower is crucial. We must get it!”

“Yes, Sir!”

...

The Power Upanishad Symbol Tower had pierced through layers of space, crossing billions of miles in just a blink of an eye as if it could tear space.

It had turned into a jet of starlight, flashing and then disappearing. Many warriors had seen it, feeling their souls shaken. They immediately understood that some treasure would be near them, but when they pulled themselves together to check, they got nothing.

The Power Upanishad Symbol Tower flew all the way, breaking spaces. Shortly, it pierced into the chaotic space basin outside Desolate Territory.

Zi Yao sat on a high, seven-colored throne on a massive asteroid. Her eyes were deep as if they could see through the whole world. She released her Soul Consciousness to find Shi Yan in the turbulent space current.

Sizzle!

A jet of starlight zoomed over; the light flashed and then disappeared, but it could still make her soul shiver.

She opened her eyes, shooting an amazing light as she was surprised. “The Power Upanishad Symbol Tower!” She screamed. She was stunned at first, but she got a hold of herself shortly after. Immediately, she used her soul to check the direction of that jet of light. Then, her true body moved, turning this asteroid into a shooting star.

The shooting star moved rapidly toward the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower, also heading to Shi Yan’s location.

...

Grace Mainland...

Adele, Ming Hao, and Xuan He gathered behind the Immortal Realm. They were observing Shi Yan and Audrey, their faces dark and grieved.

Shi Yan had escaped the soul altar, entering Audrey’s head. They were waiting with hope to see her situation getting better. Unfortunately, she was still unconscious, her breath weakening.

Shi Yan’s body frowned as if he was facing a big trouble. It made their hearts sink further as they became tenser.

Dracula, Hiro, and Gay of the White Bone Clan; Montecie and Mei Ji of the Phantom Clan were gathered, watching Shi Yan send his soul to swallow her Origin.

Swoosh! Swoosh! Swoosh!

All of a sudden, a fierce wave of energy came from a far area in this space basin, swarming the Grace Mainland.

Hiro and Montecie changed their countenances. They sensed for a while and found it was so intimidating that it could threaten the Grace Mainland.

Shi Yan had asked the two of them to protect the Grace Mainland. As they had agreed with him, they must ensure that the Grace Mainland would be alright. Seeing that fierce energy attack, Hiro was stern, “I’m going there to check!”

Hiro turned into a gold arrow, shooting out of the barrier. As soon as he came to the chaotic basin, his eyes brightened, almost choking on his own breath, “Power Upanishad Symbol Tower!”

Seeing the strange situation, he pondered, then sent a message to Montecie. “Retrieve the light barriers. The Power Upanishad Symbol Tower just came back!”

On the Grace Mainland, Montecie was thrilled. She didn’t think much, seizing the time to control her power Upanishad in cooperation with Hiro. They lifted layers of barriers on the Grace Mainland.

Boom!

The Power Upanishad Symbol Tower turned into a jet of starlight. As soon as it came near the Grace Mainland, it transformed back into a giant tower.

Slowly, the colossal tower landed through layers of clouds in the sky, aiming at Shi Yan’s head.

It was so strange that the tower halted above Shi Yan’s head, as if it was hesitant.

“It... What’s happened?” Dracula of the White Bone Clan asked. He hesitated for a while before he could get it. “The Power Upanishad Symbol Tower has fused with Shi Yan’s co-soul. And now, his co-soul is in Audrey’s head, which makes his aura different.”

Hearing him, the crowd of warriors was frightened. They all looked skeptical.

The thing that had fused with the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower was actually Shi Yan’s soul. And now, his co-soul had gone to Audrey’s head. As his aura on his body was changed, the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower was confused about whether it should go to Shi Yan’s body or Audrey’s head.

The onlookers held their breath, watching the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower.

Swoosh!

The Power Upanishad Symbol Tower changed into the cluster of light, heading toward Audrey, intruding her soul altar. The people around couldn’t help but scream in panic on seeing this.

...

On Audrey’s soul altar, Shi Yan’s soul was like a dark shadow, hovering in front of Audrey’s Incipient Extent and calling her host soul, which was floating above the Incipient Extent.

Audrey hadn’t answered Shi Yan, but the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower had come first. It seemed to run toward him.

While Shi Yan was still bewildered, the terrifying energy fluctuations of the Soul Refining Cauldron came from the dark area in Audrey’s Incipient Extent. Right after that, countless soul vines slithered like snakes, reaching toward him and trying to pull his soul into the Soul Refining Cauldron.

The Soul Refining Cauldron was a divine weapon in soul class, and it had fused with Audrey’s Origin. As Shi Yan intruded this area, the soul Refining Cauldron had instinctively considered him an enemy.

Without Audrey’s control, the Soul Refining Cauldron began to attack Shi Yan.

It was almost unavoidable!

It was him who courted death as he dared to use his soul to attack another expert in her soul altar who even had the soul of an Absolute Beginning creature.

At the moment the terrifying aura of the Soul Refining Cauldron was slowly reaching toward him, Shi Yan was frightened. He continually sent messages to Audrey, but she hadn’t answered yet. Seeing the dangerous situation, he didn’t dare to linger and decided to retreat.

However, at this moment, a powerful light that could tear the dim-lit world in this place came dazzlingly.

The massive Power Upanishad Symbol Tower suddenly came from the world outside, becoming the armor that could protect everything, shrouding his soul immediately. The Soul Refining Cauldron couldn’t pierce through this thick protection, so it couldn’t attack Shi Yan’s soul.

Shi Yan suddenly had a feeling of blood connecting. It was like he had finally and officially fused with the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower at this moment.

Previously, his fusion wasn’t complete because the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower still had Hui’s Soul Seal, which was like a contaminant. Before he could clean that contaminant, he couldn’t fuse with it fully.

Today, that Soul Seal was cleared by Devour.

Shi Yan had lost the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower for a short time. Unexpectedly, it was his luck amidst a misfortune. Devour had cleaned the tower for him, and today, he had finally fused with the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower. With his soul and aura, no one could easily snatch the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower from him.

Unless he was gone and his Soul Seal vanished from this world, no one could dream to take the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower from his hands!

Shi Yan suddenly understood many things.

As the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower was protecting him, he wasn’t afraid of the Soul Refining Cauldron anymore. He focused on calling Audrey.

“I am Shi Yan!”

“I am Shi Yan!”

“It’s me!”

He called her continually, trying to contact Audrey to receive her help.

After an unknown time, the Soul Refining Cauldron stopped attacking him. As Shi Yan was still perplexed, Audrey had finally answered him. “Shi Yan, my condition... isn’t really good. It’s...getting stronger. It can use the Origin to block my soul. It’s consuming me. I can’t hold on for a long time...” Audrey’s messages were interrupted. She was being weakened faster.

“I’m here to help you. But to do that, I may harm you. I need you to cooperate with me. Let me take your Origin. Otherwise, your soul will be consumed until you die.” Shi Yan didn’t dare to linger, trying to explain the situation briefly. “It’s the only method. The Origins are gathered and fused. Your soul has its Soul Seal. It can use that seal to find you through the Origin to kill you.”

“Can you tell me why you aren’t affected?” Audrey asked all of a sudden.

“My soul doesn’t belong to Desolate Territory,” Shi Yan pondered and then answered.

Audrey pondered for a while, then said, “Okay, I’ll cooperate with you.”
